bio: From software to robots, to data and AI, to community and art, I make things and tell the story along the way. Currently, I run the GBP Computer Science Club with the goal of building an environment where idea and initiative form without border. One of its most ambitious projects to date is HuskyHack, a hackathon bringing together 150+ talented individuals to work on projects in under 24h, forming teams that continue to make impacts beyond the competition.
